symbol.title: Aries, the Ram
symbol.desc: A curved ram-horn arc of stars.

symbol.title: Taurus, the Bull
symbol.desc: A V of the Hyades rising to two horn tips.

symbol.title: Gemini, the Twins
symbol.desc: Twin parallel columns joined at head and foot.

symbol.title: Cancer, the Crab
symbol.desc: An inverted Y crab body.

symbol.title: Leo, the Lion
symbol.desc: The sickle curving into a haunch triangle.

symbol.title: Virgo, the Maiden
symbol.desc: A reclining bent line anchored by a bright star.

symbol.title: Libra, the Scales
symbol.desc: A beam with two hanging pans.

symbol.title: Scorpio, the Scorpion
symbol.desc: A long curved tail ending in a hooked stinger.

symbol.title: Sagittarius, the Archer
symbol.desc: A drawn bow and the shaft of an arrow.

symbol.title: Capricorn, the Sea-Goat
symbol.desc: A triangular sea-goat wedge.

symbol.title: Aquarius, the Water-Bearer
symbol.desc: Double zigzag water lines.

symbol.title: Pisces, the Fishes
symbol.desc: Two arcs tied at a central knot star.

symbol.title: Year of the Rat
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a rat.

symbol.title: Year of the Ox
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting an ox.

symbol.title: Year of the Tiger
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a tiger.

symbol.title: Year of the Rabbit
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a rabbit.

symbol.title: Year of the Dragon
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a dragon.

symbol.title: Year of the Snake
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a snake.

symbol.title: Year of the Horse
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a horse.

symbol.title: Year of the Goat
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a goat.

symbol.title: Year of the Monkey
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a monkey.

symbol.title: Year of the Rooster
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a rooster.

symbol.title: Year of the Dog
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a dog.

symbol.title: Year of the Pig
symbol.desc: A minimal line-creature suggesting a pig.

symbol.title: New moon
symbol.desc: The dark disc of the new moon.

symbol.title: Waxing crescent moon
symbol.desc: A thin lit crescent on the right.

symbol.title: First quarter moon
symbol.desc: The right half lit.

symbol.title: Waxing gibbous moon
symbol.desc: Most of the disc lit, growing.

symbol.title: Full moon
symbol.desc: The whole disc lit.

symbol.title: Waning gibbous moon
symbol.desc: Most of the disc lit, shrinking.

symbol.title: Last quarter moon
symbol.desc: The left half lit.

symbol.title: Waning crescent moon
symbol.desc: A thin lit crescent on the left.
